name: Robert Boyle
title: Chemist & Physicist
bio: Anglo-Irish natural philosopher, chemist, physicist, and inventor, regarded as the first modern chemist. Best known for Boyle's Law relating gas pressure and volume.
faith: A deeply devout Christian who wrote extensively on theology and funded Bible translations. He established the Boyle Lectures for defending Christianity against atheism and viewed science as a way to understand God's creation.

sources.title: Robert Boyle — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his extensive theological writings and Bible translations

sources.title: Boyle Lectures — Wikipedia
sources.note: The lecture series Boyle established to defend Christianity

tagline: The first modern chemist who funded Bible translations worldwide
